overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The scene transitions from a covered walkway with reflective glass facades to a massive open plaza filled with towering digital billboards and advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with glass facade

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered walkway, following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: woman in white top and red pants walking ahead of ego

entered.detail: modern glass facade building with large reflective windows showing neon advertisements
large illuminated advertisement screen mounted on building facade
metal and concrete seating along the right side of the walkway
wet polished concrete tiles reflecting neon lights and surroundings

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered pedestrian walkway with a modern glass office building on the left displaying large digital advertisements. Benches line the right side where a few pedestrians sit, while the wet reflective pavement mirrors the neon lights overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza approach with distant city skyline

events.description: exiting covered walkway into open plaza area with view of distant skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: continuing forward into the open plaza area toward the distant skyline

entered.detail: illuminated sign reading 'Night City' visible in the distance among towers
towering futuristic buildings with illuminated windows and neon accents
tropical trees in planters lining the right side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the character exits the covered walkway into a wider plaza. The Night City sign becomes visible in the distance among towering skyscrapers, with palm trees lining the right side and more pedestrians filling the space.

events.description: entering narrow enclosed passage between building structures
lighting becomes darker and more shadowed as moving deeper into the enclosed passage

agents.ego_description: turning left into the narrow passage and continuing forward through the corridor

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking toward ego through the narrow passage

entered.detail: enclosed walkway between tall building structures with overhead covering
massive structural support columns lining the left side of the passage
dark building facades with small illuminated windows and signs

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a narrow enclosed passage between tall buildings. The space is darker with artificial lighting from overhead fixtures, and pedestrians approach from the opposite direction through the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: massive commercial plaza with towering digital billboards

events.description: emerging from narrow passage into vast open plaza dominated by massive digital billboards
camera slows and pans upward to view the towering skyscrapers and advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking into the plaza and looking around at the massive digital displays and towering buildings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing and looking up at the massive digital billboards

entered.detail: tall commercial building with prominent 'FOURTHWALL' signage at street level
massive curved digital billboard displaying 'CIRCUS' advertisement with red and blue colors
towering building-sized digital displays covering the facades of skyscrapers
concrete seating areas for pedestrians in the open plaza

segments.scene_description: Emerging into a vast open plaza dominated by the Fourth Wall building and massive Circus billboards. The camera pans around to take in the overwhelming neon advertising covering the towering skyscrapers, with reflective wet pavement mirroring the colorful lights while pedestrians mill about the commercial district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban walkway into a vast city plaza before narrowing into a dark architectural corridor. It begins along a covered pedestrian path where wet, reflective pavement mirrors the neon glow of digital advertisements on a glass office building. As the character exits the shelter, the environment opens into a wide plaza featuring palm trees and a distant view of the Night City sign framed by towering skyscrapers. The scene then shifts as the camera turns left, leaving the open expanse to enter a narrow, enclosed passage between tall buildings. Finally, the lighting dims to artificial overhead fixtures as the character moves through the corridor toward oncoming pedestrians.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as it emerges from a confined space into a vast, neon-drenched urban plaza. It begins by stepping out into the open air, where the scale of the environment immediately expands to reveal the towering Fourth Wall building and massive Circus billboards. As the camera pans across the skyline, the view shifts to encompass an overwhelming array of digital advertisements that blanket the surrounding skyscrapers. The scene then descends to the ground, where the vibrant colors of the city are mirrored in the reflective wet pavement beneath the feet of milling pedestrians.
